title: Current Handoff
description: Live recovery state written at the end of each turn. Host reads this as a recovery hint (not as a second source of truth). Post-P8 schema: runtime provenance fields (route_name, run_id, handoff_kind, resolution_id) removed; if needed for audit, place under observability.provenance.

schema_version.description: Schema version of this handoff document

plan_id.description: The active plan_id this handoff is associated with. Post-P8 continuation primary key. Must not be null — if no active plan exists, this file should not exist.

plan_path.description: Workspace-relative path to the plan package directory

required_host_action.description: Canonical action the host must take. Replaces the old pending_clarification / pending_decision files.

artifacts.description: Arbitrary artifacts attached to this handoff (e.g. questions, options, submission state)

observability.description: Observability metadata. May include provenance sub-object for audit tracing (session_id, host, runtime legacy fields).
